message:
🌱 distribution: notification endpoints cannot be configured with environment variables (#795)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "distribution-625-notification-endpoints-cannot-be-configured-with-environment-va",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "distribution: notification endpoints cannot be configured with environment variables",
+    "description": "notification endpoints cannot be configured with environment variables. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify distribution troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your distribution deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution -n distribution --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review distribution configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant distribution configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution\nkubectl get configmap -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=distribution\n```\nWe are using the notification API to build an index of images pushed for building a search API."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for notification endpoints cannot be configured with\u2026",
+        "description": "Sorry about the confusion. A lot of the details of how this works are covered here: https://github.com/docker/distribution/blob/master/docs/configuration.md#override-specific-configuration-options.\n\nI would suggest creating a configuration file and build it out from there. I usually test with\n```yaml\nnotifications:\n    endpoints:\n        - name: pandora\n          url: http://our-event-server.orgname.net/events\n          timeout: 1s\n          threshold: 10\n          backoff: 1s\n          disabled: false\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade distribution to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade distribution:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade distribution distribution/distribution --namespace distribution\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n distribution\nhelm list -n distribution\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm notification endpoints cannot be configured with\u2026 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution -n distribution --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n distribution --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Sorry about the confusion. A lot of the details of how this works are covered here: https://github.com/docker/distribution/blob/master/docs/configuration.md#override-specific-configuration-options.\n\nI would suggest creating a configuration file and build it out from there.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "notifications:\n    endpoints:\n        - name: pandora\n          url: http://our-event-server.orgname.net/events\n          timeout: 1s\n          threshold: 10\n          backoff: 1s\n          disabled: false",
+        "version: 0.1\nlog:\n  level: debug\n  fields:\n    service: registry\n    environment: development\nstorage:\n  filesystem:\n    rootdirectory: /usr/local/var/lib/registry\nhttp:\n  addr: :5000\n  debug:\n      addr: localhost:5001\n  headers:\n      X-Content-Type-Options: [nosniff]"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "distribution",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "distribution"
+    ],

+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/distribution/distribution/issues/625",

+    },
+    "reactions": 2,
+    "comments": 25,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "docker",
+      "curl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with distribution installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
